title: Bind and port forward check — verify WSL2/Windows boundary
acceptance_criteria: Express binds to 0.0.0.0:<port> confirmed in code
Port availability checked on both WSL2 and Windows sides
Test command provided: curl http://localhost:<port> from PowerShell
WSL2 networking mode documented (NAT vs mirrored)
completion_summary: Created deploy/network-check.md with WSL2 networking modes, 0.0.0.0 binding rationale, port checks for both sides, PowerShell test command, and troubleshooting guide
